description_long: This is a tall, tapered disposable coffee cup with a dark green exterior and a white plastic lid. The cup features a prominent circular logo on the front, which includes stylized text and a central graphic, suggesting it is from a specialty coffee shop. The lid is slightly domed with a small drinking spout, typical of takeaway beverage containers. The cup's body appears to be made of coated paper or cardboard, while the lid is likely made of molded plastic. The surface of the cup is smooth and matte, with no visible handle. The overall design is utilitarian, intended for single-use beverage service in urban environments.
description: A tall, dark green disposable coffee cup with a white plastic lid and a circular branded logo on the front. The cup is smooth, matte, and lacks a handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular branded logo and the white plastic lid with a visible drinking spout.
description_view_1: Side view with the logo partially visible and the smooth, uninterrupted green surface of the cup.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain green surface and the full shape of the white lid.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the edge of the logo just visible and the rest of the cup's green surface.
